description: A person's hand presses against a patterned sofa near a seated ginger cat, which looks down with its tongue slightly visible and one paw extended toward the hand.
A cream-colored cat with a red collar lies on a geometric-patterned couch, intently watching a person's hand resting on the fabric, while the on-screen text reads 'That looks difficult!'
A ginger cat reclines on a geometric-patterned sofa while pinning a small round silver disc beneath its front paw and licking its foreleg.
A ginger cat rests on a geometric-patterned couch with its paw holding a coin, appearing to examine it curiously while on-screen text reads, "I'm gonna give it a go!"
A cream-colored cat lies on a geometric-patterned bedspread with a silver coin balanced on its front paw, its tongue slightly sticking out in concentration.
